focus: Command presentation alignment for /memory:search envelope and eval outputs

findings.summary: Phase-027 summary still documents default-OFF SPECKIT_ENVELOPE_FIDELITY_V1 while current command/presentation assets use default-ON SPECKIT_ENVELOPE_FIDELITY.
Ablation presentation template still renders generic channel deltas including trigger row and lacks packet-028 corrected-driver distinctions.
Router promises diagnostic snapshots/gate-verdict/calibration/cold-lane metadata but dashboard presentation has no visible slot for those diagnostics.
